title: BodyType: #[non_exhaustive] + Unknown(String) is correct double-defense
description: BodyType has both #[non_exhaustive] AND an Unknown(String) variant. These are not redundant — they guard different failure modes. Unknown(String) handles runtime forward compat: server sends an unrecognized wire value, it is preserved round-trip without information loss. #[non_exhaustive] handles compile-time semver compat: we can promote an Unknown value to a first-class variant in a minor version without breaking existing exhaustive match arms in caller code. Removing either weakens the design. Defend both if a contributor suggests simplifying.
close_reason: Design decision documented, no code change needed
